Create Position
MyThaiWah NEXT – Interactive Reference Guide
⚠️ Before You Begin
  • Before any hire or Job Requisition, ensure a position exists in the system. A position is the "chair" — the role that an associate fills.
  • Position availability comes from replacement of a closed position or creating a new position.
  • Head BU approval should happen before submitting in the system.
  • The system does not replace conversation — discuss with your HR Partner for any concerns or questions.

Who Can Initiate?

👤 Manager (SupOrg Manager)

Initiates the Create Position task. The request routes through HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director for approval.

👥 HR Partner

May initiate on behalf of the Manager — typically when the position was already approved offline. In this case, the Head BU approval step is skipped.

Process Route

Manager initiates → HR Partner reviews → Talent & OD reviews → Head BU approves → HR Executive / Global HR Director approves

Initiator
SupOrg Manager
→
Pre-Approval
HR Partner
→
Pre-Approval
Talent & OD
→
Final Approval
Head BU
→
Final Approval
Global HR Director
💡 Note: If the task is initiated by the HR Partner, the Head BU approval step does not occur. HR Partner initiates only when the position has already been approved prior to system entry.
Process Flow: Manager → Submit → HR Partner Reviews → Talent & OD Reviews → Head BU Approves → Global HR Director Approves
⚠️ Reminder
  • Ensure Head BU has given verbal/offline approval before submitting in the system.
  • Contact your local HR Partner if you have questions about the Supervisory Organization.
1.1Search and Select 'Create Position'

In the search bar, type Create Position and select the task from the results.

💡 You can also find this task in your home page under the HR or Staffing worklet.
1.2Select Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

Select the Supervisory Organization where the new position will be placed, then click OK.

⚠️ If the Sup Org is new and not yet in the system, contact your local HR Partner before proceeding.
1.3Select Position Request Reason

Choose the reason that best describes why this position is being created:

CategorySub-reason
New HeadcountBudgeted
New HeadcountNot Budgeted
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Job Profile Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Org Structure Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Role Redesign
Temporary HireContract / Maternity Coverage
1.4Enter Dates
  • Availability Date: The date the position becomes available in the system. This should align with your budget plan.
  • Earliest Hire Date: The earliest date a candidate can start in this position.
💡 Both fields are mandatory. Coordinate with your HR Partner if you are unsure of the correct dates.
1.5No Job Restrictions

Leave the No Job Restrictions checkbox blank (unchecked). Do not make any changes to this field.

1.6Job Details – Job Profile & Description
  • Job Profile: Select by Recent (job profiles used within the Sup Org) or by Job Family (browse all available profiles).
  • Job Description Summary & Job Description: Enter a summary and full description of the role.
💡 "Recent" shows job profiles already used in your Supervisory Organization — start here for consistency.
1.7Location

Select the Location for the position. Locations are listed by country and entity.

  • Cambodia – TWIC – Oddar Meanchey
  • China – TWIT – Shanghai
  • Thailand – Thai Wah Group – Bangkok
  • Vietnam – TWV – Ho Chi Minh
1.8Time Type

Select whether this position is Full Time or Part Time.

1.9Worker Type, Sub-Type & Submit

Worker Type: Select Employee (regular staff) or Contingent Worker (contractors/temp).

Worker Sub-Type:

  • Advisory / Consultant (Fixed Term)
  • Contract / Temporary (Fixed Term)
  • Intern (Fixed Term) (Trainee)
  • Regular / Permanent
  • Seasonal
💡 Other fields (Default Weekly Hours, Scheduled Weekly Hours, FTE, Employment System) auto-populate from the Job Profile. Edit directly in the boxes if needed.

Leave blank: Critical Job, Difficulty to Fill, Available for Overlap

Enter any relevant comments for the approvers, then click Submit.

Process Flow: HR Partner → Submit → Talent & OD Reviews → Global HR Director Approves
💡 HR Partner Initiation: When an HR Partner initiates, the Head BU approval step is skipped. This is because HR Partner initiates only when the position has already been approved prior to system entry.
1Initiate Create Position Task

Follow the same steps as Manager initiation (Steps 1.1 – 1.9) to complete the position form. Select the correct Supervisory Organization, enter position details, and submit.

💡 As HR Partner, you have visibility across multiple Sup Orgs. Ensure you select the correct Sup Org before proceeding.
2Assign Company and Cost Center

After submission, the HR Partner receives a task to add the Company name and Cost Center, then click Submit.

💡 The Company and Cost Center must match the budget allocation for this position.
3Talent & OD Partner Reviews Position Details

The Talent & OD Partner reviews and may edit Job Family, Job Profile, and other position details. Actions: Approve, Send Back, or Deny.

ℹ️ Key Rule
  • If initiated by Manager: Full route — HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director.
  • If initiated by HR Partner: Head BU step is skipped — routes directly Talent & OD → Global HR Director.
4Head BU – Final Approval (Manager-initiated only)

Head BU reviews: Organization, Job Posting Title, Number of Positions, Availability Date, and Hiring Restrictions. Actions: Approve, Send Back, or Deny.

5HR Executive / Global HR Director – Final Approval

Final approval step. Reviews full position details including Organization, Job Posting Title, Hiring Restrictions, and all job details. Actions: Approve, Send Back, or Deny.

💡 Once approved, the position is active in the system and available for Job Requisition or direct Hire.
✓✓ Position Created – Next Steps

Once all approvals are complete, the position is active. You may now proceed with a Job Requisition to recruit, or a direct Hire if a candidate is already identified.

Glossary – Key Workday Terms

Reference guide to key terms used in MyThaiWah NEXT.

Position

A defined "chair" or slot within a Supervisory Organization that an associate fills. A position must exist before a hire or Job Requisition can be created.

Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

The reporting structure in the system. Each Sup Org has a manager and contains workers who report to that manager. Positions are created within a Sup Org.

Job Family

A grouping of related Job Profiles sharing similar functions or skills (e.g., Human Resources Operations, Finance Operations).

Job Profile

A template defining the attributes of a role — including job classification, compensation grade, and default weekly hours. Selecting the correct profile ensures the position is set up properly.

Position Title

The formal, system-defined title linked to the Job Profile. Standardised across the organisation for reporting and grading.

Business Title

A more descriptive day-to-day title that may differ from the Position Title. Appears on business cards and email signatures; can be customised per individual.

Job Title (Job Posting Title)

The title visible to external candidates when a position is advertised. Used during the Job Requisition and posting stage.

Job Restrictions

Restrictions limiting who can be hired into a position — such as requiring specific qualifications or worker types. Leave blank unless specifically required.

Job Description

A narrative of the responsibilities, duties, and expectations for a position. Includes a Job Description Summary (brief overview) and the full Job Description.

Availability Date

The date the position becomes officially available in the system. Should align with the budget plan and headcount approval timeline.

Critical Job

A designation indicating the position is business-critical — its vacancy would significantly impact operations.

Difficulty to Fill

An indicator of how challenging recruitment is expected to be for this role — based on market availability or skills scarcity. Options: Low, Medium, High.

Available for Overlap

When checked, allows the position to be filled while the current incumbent is still in role — enabling a handover period.

Worker Type

Classifies the working relationship: Employee (direct employment) or Contingent Worker (contractor, consultant, or temporary).

FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)

Measure of how much of a full-time position this role represents. Full-time = 1.0 FTE; 50% part-time = 0.5 FTE. Auto-populated from the Job Profile.

Cost Center

The financial code that costs of this position are charged to. Must be assigned by HR Partner during review to ensure correct budget allocation.

⚠️ ก่อนเริ่มต้น
  • ก่อนการจ้างงานหรือการขอตำแหน่งงาน ตรวจสอบว่ามีตำแหน่งในระบบแล้ว ตำแหน่ง = 'เก้าอี้' สำหรับพนักงาน
  • ตำแหน่งมาจาก การแทนที่ตำแหน่งที่ปิดแล้ว หรือ การสร้างตำแหน่งใหม่
  • การอนุมัติจาก Head BU ควรเกิดขึ้น ก่อน การส่งในระบบ
  • ระบบไม่ได้แทนที่การสนทนา — ปรึกษา HR Partner หากมีข้อสงสัย

ใครสามารถเริ่มต้นได้?

👤 ผู้จัดการ (SupOrg Manager)

เริ่มต้นงาน Create Position คำขอจะถูกส่งผ่าน HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director

👥 HR Partner

อาจเริ่มต้นแทนผู้จัดการ — โดยทั่วไปเมื่อตำแหน่งได้รับการอนุมัติแล้วนอกระบบ ในกรณีนี้ ขั้นตอนการอนุมัติของ Head BU จะ ถูกข้ามไป

เส้นทางกระบวนการ

ผู้จัดการเริ่มต้น → HR Partner ตรวจสอบ → Talent & OD ตรวจสอบ → Head BU อนุมัติ → HR Executive / Global HR Director อนุมัติ

Initiator
SupOrg Manager
→
Pre-Approval
HR Partner
→
Pre-Approval
Talent & OD
→
Final Approval
Head BU
→
Final Approval
Global HR Director
💡 หมายเหตุ: หาก HR Partner เป็นผู้เริ่มต้น ขั้นตอนการอนุมัติของ Head BU จะไม่เกิดขึ้น HR Partner จะเริ่มต้นเฉพาะเมื่อตำแหน่งได้รับการอนุมัติก่อนการบันทึกในระบบแล้ว
ขั้นตอน: ผู้จัดการ → ส่ง → HR Partner ตรวจสอบ → Talent & OD ตรวจสอบ → Head BU อนุมัติ → Global HR Director อนุมัติ
⚠️ Reminder
  • ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่า Head BU ได้อนุมัติด้วยวาจาหรือนอกระบบก่อนส่งในระบบ
  • ติดต่อ HR Partner ของคุณหากมีคำถามเกี่ยวกับ Supervisory Organization
1.1ค้นหาและเลือก 'Create Position'

ในแถบค้นหา พิมพ์ Create Position และเลือกงานจากผลลัพธ์

💡 คุณยังสามารถพบงานนี้ได้ในหน้าแรกภายใต้ HR หรือ Staffing worklet
1.2เลือก Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

เลือก Supervisory Organization ที่จะวางตำแหน่งใหม่ แล้วคลิก OK

⚠️ หาก Sup Org ใหม่และยังไม่อยู่ในระบบ ติดต่อ HR Partner ของคุณก่อนดำเนินการต่อ
1.3เลือกเหตุผลการขอตำแหน่ง

เลือกเหตุผลที่อธิบายได้ดีที่สุดว่าทำไมจึงสร้างตำแหน่งนี้:

หมวดหมู่เหตุผลย่อย
New HeadcountBudgeted
New HeadcountNot Budgeted
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Job Profile Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Org Structure Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Role Redesign
Temporary HireContract / Maternity Coverage
1.4กรอกวันที่
  • Availability Date: วันที่ตำแหน่งพร้อมใช้งานในระบบ ควรสอดคล้องกับแผนงบประมาณของคุณ
  • Earliest Hire Date: วันเร็วที่สุดที่ผู้สมัครสามารถเริ่มงานในตำแหน่งนี้
💡 ทั้งสองฟิลด์บังคับกรอก ประสานงานกับ HR Partner หากไม่แน่ใจเกี่ยวกับวันที่ที่ถูกต้อง
1.5No Job Restrictions

ปล่อยให้ช่องทำเครื่องหมาย No Job Restrictions ว่างเปล่า (ไม่ติ๊ก) อย่าเปลี่ยนแปลงฟิลด์นี้

1.6รายละเอียดงาน – Job Profile และคำอธิบาย
  • Job Profile: เลือกจาก Recent (profiles ที่ใช้ใน Sup Org) หรือ Job Family (เรียกดู profiles ทั้งหมด)
  • Job Description Summary & Job Description: กรอกสรุปและรายละเอียดงานแบบเต็ม
💡 'Recent' แสดง Job Profile ที่ใช้ใน Supervisory Organization ของคุณแล้ว — เริ่มจากที่นี่เพื่อความสม่ำเสมอ
1.7สถานที่

เลือก Location สำหรับตำแหน่ง ระบบแสดงตามประเทศและนิติบุคคล

  • Cambodia – TWIC – Oddar Meanchey
  • China – TWIT – Shanghai
  • Thailand – Thai Wah Group – Bangkok
  • Vietnam – TWV – Ho Chi Minh
1.8ประเภทเวลา

เลือกว่าตำแหน่งนี้เป็น Full Time หรือ Part Time

1.9Worker Type, Sub-Type และส่ง

Worker Type: เลือก Employee (พนักงานประจำ) หรือ Contingent Worker (ผู้รับจ้าง)

Worker Sub-Type:

  • Advisory / Consultant (Fixed Term)
  • Contract / Temporary (Fixed Term)
  • Intern (Fixed Term) (Trainee)
  • Regular / Permanent
  • Seasonal
💡 ฟิลด์อื่นๆ (Default Weekly Hours, Scheduled Weekly Hours, FTE, Employment System) จะกรอกอัตโนมัติจาก Job Profile แก้ไขโดยตรงในกล่องหากจำเป็น

ปล่อยว่าง: Critical Job, Difficulty to Fill, Available for Overlap

กรอกความคิดเห็นที่เกี่ยวข้องสำหรับผู้อนุมัติ แล้วคลิก Submit

ขั้นตอน: HR Partner → ส่ง → Talent & OD ตรวจสอบ → Global HR Director อนุมัติ
💡 การเริ่มต้นโดย HR Partner: เมื่อ HR Partner เริ่มต้น ขั้นตอนการอนุมัติ Head BU จะ ถูกข้ามไป เนื่องจาก HR Partner จะเริ่มต้นเฉพาะเมื่อตำแหน่งได้รับการอนุมัติก่อนแล้ว
1เริ่มต้นงาน Create Position

ทำตามขั้นตอนเดียวกับการเริ่มต้นของผู้จัดการ (ขั้นตอน 1.1–1.9) เพื่อกรอกแบบฟอร์มตำแหน่ง เลือก Sup Org ที่ถูกต้อง กรอกรายละเอียด และส่ง

💡 ในฐานะ HR Partner คุณมีการมองเห็นใน Sup Org หลายแห่ง ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าคุณเลือก Sup Org ที่ถูกต้อง
2กำหนด Company และ Cost Center

หลังจากส่งแล้ว HR Partner จะได้รับงานเพื่อเพิ่ม Company และ Cost Center แล้วคลิก Submit

💡 Company และ Cost Center ต้องตรงกับการจัดสรรงบประมาณสำหรับตำแหน่งนี้
3Talent & OD Partner ตรวจสอบรายละเอียดตำแหน่ง

Talent & OD Partner ตรวจสอบและอาจแก้ไข Job Family, Job Profile และรายละเอียดอื่นๆ การดำเนินการ: Approve, Send Back หรือ Deny

ℹ️ กฎสำคัญ
  • หากเริ่มต้นโดย ผู้จัดการ: เส้นทางเต็ม — HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director
  • หากเริ่มต้นโดย HR Partner: ขั้นตอน Head BU จะ ถูกข้ามไป — ส่งตรงไปยัง Talent & OD → Global HR Director
4Head BU – การอนุมัติขั้นสุดท้าย (เฉพาะที่เริ่มต้นโดยผู้จัดการ)

Head BU ตรวจสอบ: องค์กร, Job Posting Title, จำนวนตำแหน่ง, Availability Date และข้อจำกัดการจ้าง การดำเนินการ: Approve, Send Back หรือ Deny

5HR Executive / Global HR Director – การอนุมัติขั้นสุดท้าย

ขั้นตอนการอนุมัติขั้นสุดท้าย ตรวจสอบรายละเอียดตำแหน่งทั้งหมด รวมถึง Organization, Job Posting Title, Hiring Restrictions และรายละเอียดงานทั้งหมด การดำเนินการ: Approve, Send Back หรือ Deny

💡 เมื่ออนุมัติแล้ว ตำแหน่งจะเปิดใช้งานในระบบและพร้อมสำหรับ Job Requisition หรือการจ้างงานโดยตรง
✓✓ สร้างตำแหน่งแล้ว – ขั้นตอนต่อไป

เมื่อการอนุมัติทั้งหมดเสร็จสมบูรณ์ ตำแหน่งจะเปิดใช้งาน คุณสามารถดำเนิน Job Requisition เพื่อสรรหา หรือ Hire โดยตรงหากมีผู้สมัครที่ระบุไว้แล้ว

อภิธานศัพท์ – คำศัพท์ Workday สำคัญ

คู่มืออ้างอิงสำหรับคำศัพท์สำคัญใน MyThaiWah NEXT

Position

"เก้าอี้" หรือช่องที่กำหนดไว้ภายใน Supervisory Organization ที่พนักงานเข้าไปดำรงตำแหน่ง ต้องมีตำแหน่งก่อนจึงจะสร้างการจ้างงานหรือ Job Requisition ได้

Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

โครงสร้างการรายงานในระบบ แต่ละ Sup Org มีผู้จัดการและประกอบด้วยพนักงานที่รายงานต่อผู้จัดการนั้น ตำแหน่งถูกสร้างภายใน Sup Org

Job Family

กลุ่มของ Job Profile ที่เกี่ยวข้องซึ่งมีฟังก์ชันหรือทักษะที่คล้ายกัน (เช่น Human Resources Operations, Finance Operations)

Job Profile

เทมเพลตที่กำหนดคุณสมบัติของบทบาท รวมถึงการจำแนกงาน เกรดค่าตอบแทน และชั่วโมงทำงานรายสัปดาห์เริ่มต้น

Position Title

ตำแหน่งงานที่กำหนดอย่างเป็นทางการในระบบซึ่งเชื่อมโยงกับ Job Profile มาตรฐานทั่วทั้งองค์กรเพื่อการรายงานและการจัดเกรด

Business Title

ตำแหน่งที่ใช้ในชีวิตประจำวันซึ่งอาจแตกต่างจาก Position Title ปรากฏบนนามบัตรและลายเซ็นอีเมล สามารถปรับแต่งได้ตามบุคคล

Job Title (Job Posting Title)

ตำแหน่งที่ผู้สมัครภายนอกมองเห็นเมื่อโพสต์ตำแหน่งงาน ใช้ในระหว่าง Job Requisition และขั้นตอนการโพสต์

Job Restrictions

ข้อจำกัดที่จำกัดว่าใครสามารถจ้างงานในตำแหน่งได้ เช่น ต้องการคุณสมบัติเฉพาะ ปล่อยว่างไว้เว้นแต่จำเป็นโดยเฉพาะ

Job Description

การบรรยายความรับผิดชอบ หน้าที่ และความคาดหวังสำหรับตำแหน่ง รวมถึง Job Description Summary และ Job Description แบบเต็ม

Availability Date

วันที่ตำแหน่งพร้อมใช้งานอย่างเป็นทางการในระบบ ควรสอดคล้องกับแผนงบประมาณและไทม์ไลน์การอนุมัติจำนวนพนักงาน

Critical Job

การกำหนดว่าตำแหน่งนี้มีความสำคัญต่อธุรกิจ ซึ่งหากว่างจะส่งผลกระทบอย่างมีนัยสำคัญต่อการดำเนินงาน

Difficulty to Fill

ตัวบ่งชี้ว่าคาดว่าการสรรหาจะท้าทายแค่ไหนสำหรับบทบาทนี้ ตัวเลือก: ต่ำ, ปานกลาง, สูง

Available for Overlap

เมื่อติ๊ก ช่วยให้ตำแหน่งสามารถเติมได้ขณะที่ผู้ดำรงตำแหน่งปัจจุบันยังอยู่ในบทบาท ทำให้มีช่วงส่งมอบงาน

Worker Type

จำแนกความสัมพันธ์การทำงาน: Employee (การจ้างงานโดยตรง) หรือ Contingent Worker (ผู้รับจ้าง, ที่ปรึกษา หรือชั่วคราว)

FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)

การวัดว่าบทบาทนี้แสดงถึงตำแหน่งเต็มเวลามากเพียงใด เต็มเวลา = 1.0 FTE; นอกเวลา 50% = 0.5 FTE

Cost Center

รหัสทางการเงินที่ต้นทุนของตำแหน่งนี้ถูกเรียกเก็บ ต้องได้รับการกำหนดโดย HR Partner ในระหว่างการตรวจสอบ

⚠️ Trước Khi Bắt Đầu
  • Trước khi tuyển dụng hoặc tạo Job Requisition, hãy đảm bảo vị trí đã tồn tại trong hệ thống. Vị trí = 'chiếc ghế' dành cho nhân sự.
  • Vị trí có được từ việc thay thế vị trí đã đóng hoặc tạo vị trí mới.
  • Phê duyệt của Head BU nên được thực hiện trước khi gửi vào hệ thống.
  • Hệ thống không thay thế cuộc trò chuyện — hãy trao đổi với HR Partner nếu có thắc mắc.

Ai có thể Khởi tạo?

👤 Quản lý (SupOrg Manager)

Khởi tạo tác vụ Create Position. Yêu cầu được chuyển qua HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director.

👥 HR Partner

Có thể khởi tạo thay Quản lý — thường khi vị trí đã được phê duyệt ngoài hệ thống. Trong trường hợp này, bước phê duyệt Head BU sẽ bị bỏ qua.

Quy trình

Quản lý khởi tạo → HR Partner xem xét → Talent & OD xem xét → Head BU phê duyệt → HR Executive / Global HR Director phê duyệt

Initiator
SupOrg Manager
→
Pre-Approval
HR Partner
→
Pre-Approval
Talent & OD
→
Final Approval
Head BU
→
Final Approval
Global HR Director
💡 Lưu ý: Nếu HR Partner khởi tạo tác vụ, bước phê duyệt Head BU sẽ không xảy ra. HR Partner chỉ khởi tạo khi vị trí đã được phê duyệt trước khi nhập hệ thống.
Quy trình: Quản lý → Gửi → HR Partner Xem xét → Talent & OD Xem xét → Head BU Phê duyệt → Global HR Director Phê duyệt
⚠️ Reminder
  • Đảm bảo Head BU đã phê duyệt bằng lời nói hoặc ngoài hệ thống trước khi gửi.
  • Liên hệ HR Partner nếu có câu hỏi về Supervisory Organization.
1.1Tìm kiếm và Chọn 'Create Position'

Trong thanh tìm kiếm, nhập Create Position và chọn tác vụ từ kết quả.

💡 Bạn cũng có thể tìm thấy tác vụ này trên trang chủ trong mục HR hoặc Staffing worklet.
1.2Chọn Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

Chọn Supervisory Organization nơi vị trí mới sẽ được đặt, sau đó nhấn OK.

⚠️ Nếu Sup Org mới và chưa có trong hệ thống, hãy liên hệ HR Partner trước khi tiếp tục.
1.3Chọn Lý do Yêu cầu Vị trí

Chọn lý do mô tả rõ nhất tại sao vị trí này được tạo:

Danh mụcLý do chi tiết
New HeadcountBudgeted
New HeadcountNot Budgeted
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Job Profile Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Org Structure Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Role Redesign
Temporary HireContract / Maternity Coverage
1.4Nhập Ngày tháng
  • Availability Date: Ngày vị trí có sẵn trong hệ thống. Cần phù hợp với kế hoạch ngân sách.
  • Earliest Hire Date: Ngày sớm nhất ứng viên có thể bắt đầu ở vị trí này.
💡 Cả hai trường đều bắt buộc. Phối hợp với HR Partner nếu bạn không chắc về ngày tháng.
1.5No Job Restrictions

Để trống checkbox No Job Restrictions (không tích). Không thay đổi trường này.

1.6Chi tiết Công việc – Job Profile và Mô tả
  • Job Profile: Chọn theo Recent (profile đã dùng trong Sup Org) hoặc theo Job Family (duyệt tất cả).
  • Job Description Summary & Job Description: Nhập tóm tắt và mô tả đầy đủ vai trò.
💡 "Recent" hiển thị các Job Profile đã dùng trong Sup Org — bắt đầu từ đây để đảm bảo nhất quán.
1.7Địa điểm

Chọn Location cho vị trí. Địa điểm được liệt kê theo quốc gia và pháp nhân.

  • Cambodia – TWIC – Oddar Meanchey
  • China – TWIT – Shanghai
  • Thailand – Thai Wah Group – Bangkok
  • Vietnam – TWV – Ho Chi Minh
1.8Loại Thời gian

Chọn vị trí này là Full Time hay Part Time.

1.9Worker Type, Sub-Type & Gửi

Worker Type: Chọn Employee (nhân viên chính thức) hoặc Contingent Worker (hợp đồng).

Worker Sub-Type:

  • Advisory / Consultant (Fixed Term)
  • Contract / Temporary (Fixed Term)
  • Intern (Fixed Term) (Trainee)
  • Regular / Permanent
  • Seasonal
💡 Các trường khác (Default Weekly Hours, Scheduled Weekly Hours, FTE, Employment System) tự động điền từ Job Profile. Chỉnh sửa trực tiếp nếu cần.

Để trống: Critical Job, Difficulty to Fill, Available for Overlap

Nhập bất kỳ bình luận liên quan cho người phê duyệt, sau đó nhấn Submit.

Quy trình: HR Partner → Gửi → Talent & OD Xem xét → Global HR Director Phê duyệt
💡 HR Partner Khởi tạo: Khi HR Partner khởi tạo, bước phê duyệt Head BU sẽ bị bỏ qua. Đây là vì HR Partner chỉ khởi tạo khi vị trí đã được phê duyệt trước.
1Khởi tạo tác vụ Create Position

Thực hiện các bước tương tự như Manager (Bước 1.1–1.9) để hoàn thành form vị trí. Chọn Sup Org chính xác, nhập chi tiết và gửi.

💡 Là HR Partner, bạn có quyền truy cập nhiều Sup Org. Đảm bảo chọn đúng Sup Org trước khi tiếp tục.
2Gán Company và Cost Center

Sau khi gửi, HR Partner nhận tác vụ thêm Company và Cost Center, sau đó nhấn Submit.

💡 Company và Cost Center phải khớp với phân bổ ngân sách cho vị trí này.
3Talent & OD Partner Xem xét Chi tiết Vị trí

Talent & OD Partner xem xét và có thể chỉnh sửa Job Family, Job Profile và các chi tiết khác. Hành động: Approve, Send Back, hoặc Deny.

ℹ️ Quy tắc Quan trọng
  • Nếu do Manager khởi tạo: Đầy đủ — HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director.
  • Nếu do HR Partner khởi tạo: Bước Head BU bị bỏ qua — thẳng Talent & OD → Global HR Director.
4Head BU – Phê duyệt Cuối (Chỉ khi Manager khởi tạo)

Head BU xem xét: Tổ chức, Job Posting Title, Số vị trí, Availability Date và Hiring Restrictions. Hành động: Approve, Send Back, hoặc Deny.

5HR Executive / Global HR Director – Phê duyệt Cuối

Bước phê duyệt cuối cùng. Xem xét toàn bộ chi tiết vị trí bao gồm Organization, Job Posting Title, Hiring Restrictions và tất cả chi tiết công việc. Hành động: Approve, Send Back, hoặc Deny.

💡 Sau khi phê duyệt, vị trí được kích hoạt trong hệ thống và sẵn sàng cho Job Requisition hoặc Hire trực tiếp.
✓✓ Vị trí đã tạo – Bước tiếp theo

Sau khi tất cả phê duyệt hoàn tất, vị trí được kích hoạt. Bạn có thể tiến hành Job Requisition để tuyển dụng, hoặc Hire trực tiếp nếu đã có ứng viên.

Bảng thuật ngữ – Các thuật ngữ quan trọng

Hướng dẫn tham khảo các thuật ngữ trong MyThaiWah NEXT.

Position

Một "chiếc ghế" hoặc vị trí được xác định trong Supervisory Organization mà nhân sự sẽ đảm nhận. Phải tồn tại vị trí trước khi tạo Hire hoặc Job Requisition.

Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

Cấu trúc báo cáo trong hệ thống. Mỗi Sup Org có một quản lý và chứa các nhân viên báo cáo cho quản lý đó. Vị trí được tạo trong Sup Org.

Job Family

Nhóm các Job Profile liên quan chia sẻ chức năng hoặc kỹ năng tương tự (ví dụ: Human Resources Operations, Finance Operations).

Job Profile

Mẫu xác định các thuộc tính của vai trò — bao gồm phân loại công việc, bậc lương và giờ làm việc mặc định hàng tuần.

Position Title

Chức danh chính thức do hệ thống xác định, liên kết với Job Profile. Được chuẩn hóa trên toàn tổ chức.

Business Title

Chức danh mô tả hàng ngày có thể khác với Position Title. Xuất hiện trên danh thiếp và chữ ký email; có thể tùy chỉnh theo cá nhân.

Job Title (Job Posting Title)

Chức danh hiển thị với ứng viên bên ngoài khi đăng tin tuyển dụng. Dùng trong giai đoạn Job Requisition và đăng tin.

Job Restrictions

Các hạn chế giới hạn ai có thể được tuyển vào vị trí — như yêu cầu bằng cấp cụ thể. Để trống trừ khi có yêu cầu đặc biệt.

Job Description

Mô tả về trách nhiệm, nhiệm vụ và kỳ vọng cho một vị trí. Bao gồm Job Description Summary và Job Description đầy đủ.

Availability Date

Ngày vị trí chính thức có sẵn trong hệ thống. Cần phù hợp với kế hoạch ngân sách và lịch phê duyệt nhân sự.

Critical Job

Chỉ định rằng vị trí này quan trọng đối với hoạt động kinh doanh — khi bị trống sẽ ảnh hưởng đáng kể đến vận hành.

Difficulty to Fill

Chỉ số mức độ khó tuyển dụng dự kiến cho vai trò này. Các tùy chọn: Thấp, Trung bình, Cao.

Available for Overlap

Khi được chọn, cho phép vị trí được lấp đầy trong khi đương nhiệm vẫn còn trong vai trò — cho phép giai đoạn bàn giao.

Worker Type

Phân loại quan hệ lao động: Employee (nhân viên chính thức) hoặc Contingent Worker (hợp đồng, tư vấn, tạm thời).

FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)

Đo lường mức độ đại diện cho vị trí toàn thời gian. Toàn thời gian = 1.0 FTE; bán thời gian 50% = 0.5 FTE.

Cost Center

Mã tài chính mà chi phí của vị trí này được tính vào. Phải được HR Partner gán trong bước xem xét để đảm bảo phân bổ ngân sách chính xác.

⚠️ 开始之前
  • 在招聘或提交岗位申请之前，确保系统中已存在该职位。职位 = 员工的"席位"。
  • 职位来源于替换已关闭职位或创建新职位。
  • Head BU 的批准应在提交系统之前完成。
  • 系统不能替代沟通 — 如有疑问，请与HR伙伴沟通。

谁可以发起?

👤 经理（SupOrg Manager）

发起 Create Position 任务。请求路由通过 HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director。

👥 HR 伙伴

可代表经理发起 — 通常是在职位已在系统外获得批准时。此时，Head BU 审批步骤将被跳过。

流程路径

经理发起 → HR Partner 审核 → Talent & OD 审核 → Head BU 批准 → HR Executive / Global HR Director 批准

Initiator
SupOrg Manager
→
Pre-Approval
HR Partner
→
Pre-Approval
Talent & OD
→
Final Approval
Head BU
→
Final Approval
Global HR Director
💡 注意：如果由 HR Partner 发起，则不会有 Head BU 审批步骤。HR Partner 仅在职位已预先获得批准后才会发起。
流程：经理 → 提交 → HR Partner 审核 → Talent & OD 审核 → Head BU 批准 → Global HR Director 批准
⚠️ Reminder
  • 确保 Head BU 在提交系统前已口头或线下批准。
  • 如有关于 Supervisory Organization 的疑问，请联系您的 HR Partner。
1.1搜索并选择 'Create Position'

在搜索栏中输入 Create Position，然后从结果中选择该任务。

💡 您也可以在主页的 HR 或 Staffing worklet 下找到此任务。
1.2选择 Supervisory Organization（Sup Org）

选择新职位将放置的 Supervisory Organization，然后点击 OK。

⚠️ 如果 Sup Org 是新的且尚未在系统中，请先联系您的 HR Partner。
1.3选择职位申请原因

选择最能描述创建此职位原因的选项：

类别子原因
New HeadcountBudgeted
New HeadcountNot Budgeted
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Job Profile Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Org Structure Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Role Redesign
Temporary HireContract / Maternity Coverage
1.4输入日期
  • Availability Date：职位在系统中生效的日期，需与预算计划一致。
  • Earliest Hire Date：候选人可以开始担任该职位的最早日期。
💡 两个字段均为必填项。如不确定正确日期，请与 HR Partner 协调。
1.5No Job Restrictions

将 No Job Restrictions 复选框保持空白（不勾选）。不要更改此字段。

1.6职位详情 – Job Profile 与职位描述
  • Job Profile：按 Recent（Sup Org 内使用过的）或 Job Family（浏览所有）选择。
  • Job Description Summary & Job Description：输入职位简介和完整描述。
💡 "Recent" 显示 Sup Org 中已使用过的 Job Profile — 从这里开始以保持一致性。
1.7地点

为职位选择 Location。地点按国家和实体列出。

  • Cambodia – TWIC – Oddar Meanchey
  • China – TWIT – Shanghai
  • Thailand – Thai Wah Group – Bangkok
  • Vietnam – TWV – Ho Chi Minh
1.8时间类型

选择此职位是 Full Time 还是 Part Time。

1.9Worker Type、Sub-Type 与提交

Worker Type：选择 Employee（正式员工）或 Contingent Worker（合同工）。

Worker Sub-Type:

  • Advisory / Consultant (Fixed Term)
  • Contract / Temporary (Fixed Term)
  • Intern (Fixed Term) (Trainee)
  • Regular / Permanent
  • Seasonal
💡 其他字段（Default Weekly Hours、Scheduled Weekly Hours、FTE、Employment System）将从 Job Profile 自动填充。如需更改，可直接在框中输入。

留空：Critical Job、Difficulty to Fill、Available for Overlap

为审批人输入相关备注，然后点击 Submit。

流程：HR Partner → 提交 → Talent & OD 审核 → Global HR Director 批准
💡 HR Partner 发起：当 HR Partner 发起时，Head BU 审批步骤将被跳过。这是因为 HR Partner 只在职位已预先批准后才发起。
1发起 Create Position 任务

按照与经理发起相同的步骤（步骤 1.1–1.9）填写职位表单。选择正确的 Sup Org，输入详细信息并提交。

💡 作为 HR Partner，您可以访问多个 Sup Org。请确保在继续之前选择正确的 Sup Org。
2分配 Company 和 Cost Center

提交后，HR Partner 收到任务，需添加 Company 名称和 Cost Center，然后点击 Submit。

💡 Company 和 Cost Center 必须与此职位的预算分配相符。
3Talent & OD Partner 审核职位详情

Talent & OD Partner 审核并可能编辑 Job Family、Job Profile 及其他职位详情。操作：Approve、Send Back 或 Deny。

ℹ️ 关键规则
  • 如果由经理发起：完整路径 — HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director。
  • 如果由 HR Partner 发起：Head BU 步骤被跳过 — 直接 Talent & OD → Global HR Director。
4Head BU – 最终批准（仅限经理发起）

Head BU 审核：Organization、Job Posting Title、Number of Positions、Availability Date 和 Hiring Restrictions。操作：Approve、Send Back 或 Deny。

5HR Executive / Global HR Director – 最终批准

最终审批步骤。审核完整职位详情，包括 Organization、Job Posting Title、Hiring Restrictions 和所有职位详情。操作：Approve、Send Back 或 Deny。

💡 批准后，职位在系统中生效，可用于 Job Requisition 或直接招聘。
✓✓ 职位已创建 – 后续步骤

所有审批完成后，职位生效。您现在可以进行 Job Requisition 进行招聘，或者如果已确定候选人，可直接进行 Hire。

词汇表 – 关键术语

MyThaiWah NEXT 中关键术语的参考指南。

Position

Supervisory Organization 中的一个定义"席位"，由员工担任。创建招聘或 Job Requisition 之前必须先有职位。

Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

系统中的汇报结构。每个 Sup Org 有一个经理，包含向该经理汇报的员工。职位在 Sup Org 内创建。

Job Family

共享相似职能或技能的相关 Job Profile 分组（例如，Human Resources Operations、Finance Operations）。

Job Profile

定义职位属性的模板，包括职位分类、薪资等级和默认每周工作时间。

Position Title

与 Job Profile 关联的正式系统定义职称，在组织内标准化用于报告和评级。

Business Title

更具描述性的日常职称，可能与 Position Title 不同。出现在名片和电子邮件签名上，可按个人定制。

Job Title (Job Posting Title)

职位发布时对外部候选人可见的职称，在 Job Requisition 和发布阶段使用。

Job Restrictions

限制谁可以被招聘到该职位的限制条件，如特定资质要求。除非特别需要，否则留空。

Job Description

描述职位职责、任务和期望的说明文件。包括 Job Description Summary（简要概述）和完整 Job Description。

Availability Date

职位在系统中正式生效的日期，需与预算计划和人员编制批准时间线一致。

Critical Job

表明该职位对业务至关重要 — 其空缺将对运营产生重大影响。

Difficulty to Fill

表示该职位预期招聘难度的指标。选项：低、中、高。

Available for Overlap

勾选后，允许在现任人员仍在职期间填补该职位 — 实现交接期。

Worker Type

对工作关系进行分类：Employee（直接雇用）或 Contingent Worker（合同工、顾问或临时工）。

FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)

衡量该职位代表全职职位的程度。全职 = 1.0 FTE；50% 兼职 = 0.5 FTE。

Cost Center

该职位成本所归属的财务代码。必须由 HR Partner 在审核步骤中分配，以确保正确的预算分配。

⚠️ មុននឹងចាប់ផ្តើម
  • មុនពេលជ្រើសរើស ឬដាក់សំណើការងារ ត្រូវប្រាកដថាមានមុខតំណែងនៅក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ។ មុខតំណែង = 'កៅអី' សម្រាប់បុគ្គលិក។
  • មុខតំណែងមកពី ការជំនួសមុខតំណែងដែលបានបិទ ឬ ការបង្កើតមុខតំណែងថ្មី។
  • ការអនុម័តពី Head BU គួរតែកើតឡើង មុនពេលដាក់ស្នើក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ។
  • ប្រព័ន្ធមិនអាចជំនួសការសន្ទនា — ពិភាក្សាជាមួយ HR Partner ប្រសិនបើមានសំណួរ។

អ្នកណាអាចចាប់ផ្តើម?

👤 អ្នកគ្រប់គ្រង (SupOrg Manager)

ចាប់ផ្តើមភារកិច្ច Create Position។ សំណើត្រូវបញ្ជូនតាម HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director។

👥 HR Partner

អាចចាប់ផ្តើមជំនួស Manager — ជាទូទៅនៅពេលដែលមុខតំណែងត្រូវបានអនុម័តរួចហើយ។ ក្នុងករណីនេះ ជំហានអនុម័ត Head BU នឹងត្រូវបានរំលង។

ផ្លូវដំណើរការ

Manager ចាប់ផ្តើម → HR Partner ពិនិត្យ → Talent & OD ពិនិត្យ → Head BU អនុម័ត → HR Executive / Global HR Director អនុម័ត

Initiator
SupOrg Manager
→
Pre-Approval
HR Partner
→
Pre-Approval
Talent & OD
→
Final Approval
Head BU
→
Final Approval
Global HR Director
💡 ចំណាំ: ប្រសិនបើ HR Partner ចាប់ផ្តើម ជំហានអនុម័ត Head BU នឹងមិនកើតឡើងទេ។ HR Partner ចាប់ផ្តើមតែនៅពេលដែលមុខតំណែងត្រូវបានអនុម័តមុនពេលចូលប្រព័ន្ធ។
ដំណើរការ: Manager → ដាក់ស្នើ → HR Partner ពិនិត្យ → Talent & OD ពិនិត្យ → Head BU អនុម័ត → Global HR Director អនុម័ត
⚠️ Reminder
  • ត្រូវប្រាកដថា Head BU បានអនុម័តដោយផ្ទាល់មាត់ ឬក្រៅប្រព័ន្ធ មុនពេលដាក់ស្នើ។
  • ទំនាក់ទំនង HR Partner ប្រសិនបើមានសំណួរអំពី Supervisory Organization។
1.1ស្វែងរក និងជ្រើសរើស 'Create Position'

នៅក្នុងរបារស្វែងរក វាយ Create Position ហើយជ្រើសរើសភារកិច្ចពីលទ្ធផល។

💡 អ្នកក៏អាចរកឃើញភារកិច្ចនេះនៅលើទំព័រដើម ក្រោម HR ឬ Staffing worklet។
1.2ជ្រើសរើស Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

ជ្រើសរើស Supervisory Organization ដែលមុខតំណែងថ្មីនឹងត្រូវដាក់ ហើយចុច OK។

⚠️ ប្រសិនបើ Sup Org ថ្មី និងមិនទាន់មាននៅក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ ទំនាក់ទំនង HR Partner របស់អ្នក មុននឹងបន្ត។
1.3ជ្រើសរើសហេតុផលសំណើមុខតំណែង

ជ្រើសរើសហេតុផលដែលពិពណ៌នាបានល្អបំផុតពីមូលហេតុដែលបង្កើតមុខតំណែងនេះ:

ប្រភេទហេតុផលរង
New HeadcountBudgeted
New HeadcountNot Budgeted
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Job Profile Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Org Structure Change
Position Replacement (Old Position Closed)Role Redesign
Temporary HireContract / Maternity Coverage
1.4បញ្ចូលកាលបរិច្ឆេទ
  • Availability Date: ថ្ងៃដែលមុខតំណែងអាចប្រើបាននៅក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ។ គួរស្របតាមផែនការថវិការ។
  • Earliest Hire Date: កាលបរិច្ឆេទដំបូងបំផុតដែលបេក្ខជនអាចចាប់ផ្តើមនៅក្នុងមុខតំណែងនេះ។
💡 ទាំងពីរ field គឺជាកំហិត។ សម្របសម្រួលជាមួយ HR Partner ប្រសិនបើអ្នកមិនច្បាស់អំពីកាលបរិច្ឆេទ។
1.5No Job Restrictions

ទុក checkbox No Job Restrictions ទទេ (មិនត្រូវបើក)។ កុំផ្លាស់ប្តូរ field នេះ។

1.6ព័ត៌មានការងារ – Job Profile និងការពិពណ៌នា
  • Job Profile: ជ្រើសរើសតាម Recent (profiles ដែលប្រើក្នុង Sup Org) ឬតាម Job Family (មើលទាំងអស់)។
  • Job Description Summary & Job Description: បញ្ចូលសង្ខេប និងការពិពណ៌នាពេញលេញ។
💡 "Recent" បង្ហាញ Job Profile ដែលប្រើហើយក្នុង Sup Org — ចាប់ផ្តើមពីទីនេះដើម្បីភាពជាប់លាប់។
1.7ទីតាំង

ជ្រើសរើស Location សម្រាប់មុខតំណែង។ ទីតាំងត្រូវបានរាយបញ្ជីតាមប្រទេស និងអង្គភាព។

  • Cambodia – TWIC – Oddar Meanchey
  • China – TWIT – Shanghai
  • Thailand – Thai Wah Group – Bangkok
  • Vietnam – TWV – Ho Chi Minh
1.8ប្រភេទពេលវេលា

ជ្រើសរើសថាតើមុខតំណែងនេះជា Full Time ឬ Part Time។

1.9Worker Type, Sub-Type និងដាក់ស្នើ

Worker Type: ជ្រើសរើស Employee (បុគ្គលិកទៀងទាត់) ឬ Contingent Worker (អ្នកម៉ៅការ)។

Worker Sub-Type:

  • Advisory / Consultant (Fixed Term)
  • Contract / Temporary (Fixed Term)
  • Intern (Fixed Term) (Trainee)
  • Regular / Permanent
  • Seasonal
💡 Fields ផ្សេងទៀត (Default Weekly Hours, Scheduled Weekly Hours, FTE, Employment System) ត្រូវបានបំពេញដោយស្វ័យប្រវត្តិពី Job Profile។ កែប្រែដោយផ្ទាល់ប្រសិនបើត្រូវការ។

ទុកទទេ: Critical Job, Difficulty to Fill, Available for Overlap

បញ្ចូលមតិយោបល់ណាមួយដែលពាក់ព័ន្ធសម្រាប់អ្នកអនុម័ត ហើយចុច Submit។

ដំណើរការ: HR Partner → ដាក់ស្នើ → Talent & OD ពិនិត្យ → Global HR Director អនុម័ត
💡 HR Partner ចាប់ផ្តើម: នៅពេល HR Partner ចាប់ផ្តើម ជំហានអនុម័ត Head BU នឹងត្រូវបានរំលង។ ព្រោះ HR Partner ចាប់ផ្តើមតែនៅពេលដែលមុខតំណែងត្រូវបានអនុម័តរួចហើយ។
1ចាប់ផ្តើមភារកិច្ច Create Position

អនុវត្តតាមជំហានដូចគ្នានឹង Manager (ជំហាន 1.1–1.9) ដើម្បីបំពេញ form មុខតំណែង។ ជ្រើសរើស Sup Org ត្រឹមត្រូវ បញ្ចូលព័ត៌មាន ហើយដាក់ស្នើ។

💡 ក្នុងនាម HR Partner អ្នកមានសិទ្ធិចូលប្រើ Sup Org ជាច្រើន។ ត្រូវប្រាកដថាអ្នកជ្រើសរើស Sup Org ត្រឹមត្រូវ មុននឹងបន្ត។
2កំណត់ Company និង Cost Center

បន្ទាប់ពីដាក់ស្នើ HR Partner ទទួលភារកិច្ចបន្ថែម Company និង Cost Center ហើយចុច Submit។

💡 Company និង Cost Center ត្រូវតែត្រូវនឹងការបែងចែកថវិការសម្រាប់មុខតំណែងនេះ។
3Talent & OD Partner ពិនិត្យព័ត៌មានមុខតំណែង

Talent & OD Partner ពិនិត្យ និងអាចកែប្រែ Job Family, Job Profile និងព័ត៌មានផ្សេងទៀត។ សកម្មភាព: Approve, Send Back, ឬ Deny។

ℹ️ ច្បាប់សំខាន់
  • ប្រសិនបើចាប់ផ្តើមដោយ Manager: ផ្លូវពេញ — HR Partner → Talent & OD → Head BU → Global HR Director។
  • ប្រសិនបើចាប់ផ្តើមដោយ HR Partner: ជំហាន Head BU នឹងត្រូវបានរំលង — ផ្ទេរត្រង់ Talent & OD → Global HR Director។
4Head BU – ការអនុម័តចុងក្រោយ (តែ Manager ចាប់ផ្តើម)

Head BU ពិនិត្យ: Organization, Job Posting Title, Number of Positions, Availability Date, និង Hiring Restrictions។ សកម្មភាព: Approve, Send Back, ឬ Deny។

5HR Executive / Global HR Director – ការអនុម័តចុងក្រោយ

ជំហានអនុម័តចុងក្រោយ។ ពិនិត្យព័ត៌មានមុខតំណែងពេញលេញ រួមមាន Organization, Job Posting Title, Hiring Restrictions និងព័ត៌មានការងារទាំងអស់។ សកម្មភាព: Approve, Send Back, ឬ Deny។

💡 បន្ទាប់ពីអនុម័ត មុខតំណែងសកម្មនៅក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ ហើយអាចប្រើសម្រាប់ Job Requisition ឬការជ្រើសរើសផ្ទាល់។
✓✓ មុខតំណែងត្រូវបានបង្កើត – ជំហានបន្ទាប់

បន្ទាប់ពីការអនុម័តទាំងអស់បានបញ្ចប់ មុខតំណែងសកម្ម។ អ្នកអាចបន្តជាមួយ Job Requisition ដើម្បីជ្រើសរើស ឬ Hire ផ្ទាល់ប្រសិនបើបេក្ខជនត្រូវបានកំណត់ហើយ។

វចនានុក្រម – ពាក្យកំណត់ Workday

មគ្គុទ្ទេសក៍យោងសម្រាប់ពាក្យកំណត់នៅក្នុង MyThaiWah NEXT។

Position

"កៅអី" ឬកន្លែងដែលបានកំណត់នៅក្នុង Supervisory Organization ដែលបុគ្គលិកបំពេញ។ មុខតំណែងត្រូវតែមានមុនពេលបង្កើត Hire ឬ Job Requisition។

Supervisory Organization (Sup Org)

រចនាសម្ព័ន្ធរបាយការណ៍ក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ។ Sup Org នីមួយៗមានអ្នកគ្រប់គ្រង និងមានបុគ្គលិកដែលរាយការណ៍ទៅអ្នកគ្រប់គ្រងនោះ។ មុខតំណែងត្រូវបានបង្កើតក្នុង Sup Org។

Job Family

ក្រុម Job Profile ដែលពាក់ព័ន្ធ មានមុខងារ ឬជំនាញស្រដៀងគ្នា (ឧ. Human Resources Operations, Finance Operations)។

Job Profile

គំរូដែលកំណត់គុណលក្ខណៈនៃតួនាទី — រួមមានការចាត់ថ្នាក់ការងារ ចំណាត់ថ្នាក់ប្រាក់ខែ និងម៉ោងធ្វើការប្រចាំសប្ដាហ៍លំនាំដើម។

Position Title

តំណែងផ្លូវការដែលកំណត់ដោយប្រព័ន្ធ ដែលភ្ជាប់ជាមួយ Job Profile។ ត្រូវបានធ្វើស្ដង់ដារទូទាំងអង្គការ។

Business Title

តំណែងប្រចាំថ្ងៃដែលពណ៌នាជាង ដែលអាចខុសពី Position Title។ បង្ហាញនៅលើកាតអាជីវកម្ម និងហត្ថលេខាអ៊ីម៉ែល។

Job Title (Job Posting Title)

តំណែងដែលអ្នកដើម្បីប្រកួតប្រជែងខាងក្រៅ មើលឃើញ នៅពេលផ្សព្វផ្សាយមុខតំណែង។ ប្រើក្នុងដំណាក់កាល Job Requisition និងការផ្សព្វផ្សាយ។

Job Restrictions

ការដាក់កម្រិតដែលកំណត់ថាអ្នកណាអាចត្រូវបានជ្រើសរើសចូលក្នុងមុខតំណែង។ ទុកទទេ លុះត្រាតែមានតម្រូវការជាក់លាក់។

Job Description

ការពណ៌នាអំពីទំនួលខុសត្រូវ ភារកិច្ច និងការរំពឹងទុកសម្រាប់មុខតំណែង។ រួមមាន Job Description Summary និង Job Description ពេញ។

Availability Date

ថ្ងៃដែលមុខតំណែងសម្រាប់ប្រើបានជាផ្លូវការក្នុងប្រព័ន្ធ។ គួរស្របតាមផែនការថវិការ និងកាលវិភាគអនុម័ត។

Critical Job

ការកំណត់ថាមុខតំណែងនេះសំខាន់ចំពោះអាជីវកម្ម — ការទំនេររបស់វានឹងប៉ះពាល់ដល់ប្រតិបត្តិការយ៉ាងខ្លាំង។

Difficulty to Fill

សូចនាករអំពីភាពលំបាកក្នុងការជ្រើសរើសសម្រាប់តួនាទីនេះ។ ជម្រើស: ទាប, មធ្យម, ខ្ពស់។

Available for Overlap

នៅពេលបើក អនុញ្ញាតឱ្យមុខតំណែងអាចបំពេញបានខណៈដែលអ្នកកាន់បច្ចុប្បន្ននៅតែក្នុងតួនាទី — ដើម្បីអនុញ្ញាតឱ្យមានការផ្ទេរ។

Worker Type

ចាត់ថ្នាក់ទំនាក់ទំនងការងារ: Employee (ការងារផ្ទាល់) ឬ Contingent Worker (អ្នកម៉ៅការ, អ្នកប្រឹក្សា, ឬបណ្ដោះអាសន្ន)។

FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)

វាស់ស្ទង់ថាតើតួនាទីនេះតំណាងអោយមុខតំណែងពេញម៉ោងប៉ុន្មាន។ ពេញម៉ោង = 1.0 FTE; ពាក់កណ្ដាលម៉ោង 50% = 0.5 FTE។

Cost Center

លេខកូដហិរញ្ញវត្ថុដែលការចំណាយនៃមុខតំណែងនេះត្រូវបានគិតទៅ។ ត្រូវតែកំណត់ដោយ HR Partner ក្នុងការពិនិត្យ។
